code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let toks = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut prev: Option<Int> = None
  mut i = 0
  while i < toks.len()
    let tok = toks.get(i)
    match tok
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(n)
        match prev
        when Some(p)
          if p == n
            ()
          else
            result = list.push(result, n)
            prev = Some(n)
          end
        when None
          result = list.push(result, n)
          prev = Some(n)
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut j = 0
  while j < result.len()
    match result.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      if j == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  println(out)
when None
  println("")
end
